texto: A society without the authentic and vibrant influence of women is a society that is not fully alive. A culture lacking the vital creativity of women is disadvantaged. Without the bearing of women on world affairs, humanity's already tenuous grip on peace is made even less sure. When women are barred, whether by law, cultural prejudice, or political ideology, from developing their full potential and offering their unique gifts, it is an injustice to women themselves and to humanity as a whole.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stephen Catanzarite sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “A society without the authentic and vibrant influence of women is a society that is not fully ali…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, feminism, humanity, útil em momentos de humanity e women.
